subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh! Your letter was received in Paris and perused. A question had been posed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان حضرت بهاء الله نامه شما در پاریس رسید قرائت گردید مطلبی سوال نموده
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @purpose; goal of creation, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy
